title: teucrium polium subsp. album
intro: Teucrium polium subsp. album, also known as White Germander or White Teucrium, is a subspecies of the Teucrium polium plant, a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating a variety of health issues such as digestive problems and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Teucrium polium subsp. album include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of conditions like bronchitis and asthma, as well as aiding in the treatment of wounds and skin irritations. Teucrium polium subsp. album can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
